_doc: AI Tool marker driver — add to any node's capabilities to expose it as a callable tool for Agent nodes. Configure which actions are visible and provide a natural-language description.
label: Generic AI Tool
description: Exposes a node as a callable tool for Agent nodes. Add to any node's capabilities to make its actions discoverable and invocable by AI agents via tool use.

description.label: Node Description
description.description: Natural-language description of this node for the AI agent (what it is, what it does)
description.placeholder: Linux router managing the core network segment

expose_actions.label: Exposed Actions
expose_actions.description: Actions exposed as tools to Agent nodes. Leave all unchecked to expose every non-interactive action.

_marker._doc: This driver has no executable actions — it is a capabilities marker only.
